case_title: OLIVIA BURA et al VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IN SUPPORT OF DEMURRER
DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HEARING SET FOR APR-15-2013 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: OFF CALENDAR.
